programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into "Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training" at Baby Corp. Boss makes up his own imaginary friend to get out of these meetings, but after Tina gets a whiff that he may be lying, he's forced to keep up the charade at work and at home.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: It's a turf war when Bounce House Bruiser Baby encroaches on Delivery Baby's tricycle park! Tina attempts to befriend Bruiser in order to woo her back to the bounce house, but naughty behavior is the only language Bruiser understands. Determined to win this kid over, Tina ends up going rogue as a trike hoodlum, and her own field team is forced to reign her in.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of "trading up" valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter. However, a 5%er baby is in trouble and BB's field team has "got it under control"… or do they? Boss tries to juggle his Tabitha lessons with sneaking peeks at the mission in progress

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hippo did have hair… lots of hair! She was always harumphingly hot. Then one hot night while Hippo was sleeping a spark from the fire caught the end of her hairy tail! Hippo was on fire! She ran through the bush until SPLOSH! Hippo jumped in the waterhole. And from that day on Hippo stayed in the cool waters without a single hair on her hide. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tortoise's shell was all shiny and smooth. One day Tortoise discovered the birds were having a Feast in the Heavens and he tricked the Birds into making him a pair of wings. Greedy Tortoise raced the birds beyond the clouds and scoffed the whole feastt! When the Birds found out Tortoise had to jump off a cloud until BOOF!!! He landed on his shiny shell. All the animals pieced Tortoise's shell back together but from that day on Tortoise's shell was all bumpy and broken and he never moved speedily again. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with the cars running amok on his track and summons Bill and Nick to restore order to the track. But might our overzealous policeman overstep the mark?

programme.desc: Actor Gu Bon-seung shows the warmth and purity of life in the village along the river, and presents how new history was made and became one’s memory.

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim
programme.desc: Star chef Sam Kim will teach you how to make all kinds of delicious dishes – from Italian pasta, Spanish food to desserts! Follow his easy recipes and enjoy cooking!

programme.title: Yumi's Cells
programme.desc: Adapted from the popular webtoon of the same title, it tells the story of an ordinary office worker Yumi through the eyes of her brain cells, which controlled her thoughts, feelings and actions.

programme.title: The Genius Paik 3
programme.desc: Chef Paik returns with his dream team and takes on the challenge to introduce Korean cuisine in France.

programme.title: Walking Through The Village
programme.desc: Actor Gu Bon-seung shows the warmth and purity of life in the village along the river, and presents how new history was made and became one’s memory.

programme.title: I-LAND2 : N/a
programme.desc: Girl version of ENHYPEN is coming! The ultimate survival variety program by top producer TEDDY, following the creation of the next generation K-pop girl group.

programme.title: The Village Barber
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber’s license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: Yumi's Cells
programme.desc: Adapted from the popular webtoon of the same title, it tells the story of an ordinary office worker Yumi through the eyes of her brain cells, which controlled her thoughts, feelings and actions.

programme.title: Curtain Up, Class!
programme.desc: Actor Kim Tae-ri and Choi Hyun-wook turns into a drama club teacher at a rural elementary school. Together with the students, they will bring a heart-warming drama performance to viewers.

programme.title: Cha's Family
programme.desc: From Thailand to Japan, the cast explore bold local flavors, craft their own signature spicy sauce, and bring Korea’s passion for heat to a global stage—mixing food, culture, and adventure into one sizzling journey.

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: Pee Nak 2
programme.desc: Though they've fulfilled their pledges, First and Balloon secretly leave monkhood to live secular lives , but soon return when a new spirit begins to terrorize them.

programme.title: Serenity
programme.desc: A fishing boat captain's peaceful life shattered as his ex-wife begs for his help- asking him to kill her abusive husband.

programme.title: By Quantum Physics: A Nightlife Venture
programme.desc: The story is about a night club owner Lee Chan-woo, his club manager Seong Eun-yeong, and police reporter Park ki-hum that fights with an organized crime which involved alleged drug abuse and police corruption.

programme.title: Exeter
programme.desc: During a party in an abandoned asylum, teenagers perform an occult ritual that leads to a violent possession

programme.title: My Big Mama's Crazy Ride
programme.desc: One holiday, the eldest daughter-in-law who picked up the keys to the van, escapes with her daughters-in-law one by one without her husband knowing.

programme.title: The Closet
programme.desc: A recent widower tries to start over in a new home that takes a chilling turn when his daughter goes missing and a mysterious exorcisttells him to look for her in the closet.

programme.title: Bad Man
programme.desc: Na Yoo-Mi , was found dead because of an accident according to police report. But her husband, Han Byung-Do believes that it was related to Baek Dong-II, so he go after Baek Dong-II for revenge.

programme.title: Search And Destroy
programme.desc: American Ranger John Cutter seeks revenge against the notorious Ukrainian arms dealer responsible for his demise.

programme.title: Mukoku
programme.desc: Kengo was also accomplished in kendo, but he stopped participating in the martial art activity after an incident. Now, he spends his days drinking and working as a security guard at a station building. Based on novel "Mukoku" by Shu Fujisawa.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world.

programme.title: The Man Standing Next
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Korea is under the absolute control of President Park, who controls the KCIA, the organization with the edge over any branch of government.

programme.title: Monsters: Dark Continent
programme.desc: Ten years on from the events of Monsters, and the 'Infected Zones' have now spread worldwide. The Army decide to draft in more numbers to help deal with this insurgency.

programme.title: Kamala Harris: The Next President
programme.desc: This documentary explores Kamala Harris's rise from her early life in California to becoming the first female Vice President of the United States, her impact on American politics, and her potential path to becoming the first female President.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One And Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Canada: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Spring is late this year, and when it finally arrives, the race is on to find a mate and start a family; black bears and beavers in the west, wood frogs in the south and 20,000 gannets in the east all have one thing on their minds.

programme.title: Canada: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Summer is the season of plenty for most animals, but not polar bears; unable to hunt seals until the sea freezes over again, they grow hungrier by the day; for other animals summer is when youngsters must learn how to survive.

programme.title: Jaguarland
programme.desc: Explore a 400 square mile region of the Pantanal where jaguars rule and life follows the seasonal rhythm of the water.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: It is spring, and migrating ospreys return to the park. Pregnant red deer come down from the mountain tops to the lowlands to calve. On a mountainside, two big cocks fight for the right to mate in a spectacle called a lek.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: It is now June, and the park is bathed in 17 hours of daylight. With the warm temperatures come rich pickings, but for the newborn the summer months are crucial as they learn to fight, find food and avoid predators.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is when stags compete to breed, osprey chicks begin a 3000-mile migration to West Africa, salmon return to the rivers where they were born and adders give birth to live young.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Witness the story of President Clinton's impeachment, presented through archival footage of the day.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Witness how America's South and Midwest were ravaged by 148 twisters in just 18 hours.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Echo
programme.desc: The Dinosaur Echo is a documentary about the renaissance of paleontology in Canada today and what dinosaurs can teach us about climate change.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: From night stalker missions to rescue operations, see how the Little Bird helicopter earned its place among the big boys.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Watch the massive military transport aircraft C-5 Galaxy come up big time and again over its five decades of service

programme.title: Jaguarland
programme.desc: Explore a 400 square mile region of the Pantanal where jaguars rule and life follows the seasonal rhythm of the water.

programme.title: Destination Myanmar
programme.desc: Destination Myanmar will take the audience to some of Myanmar's most beautiful and stunning Asian Heritage wetlands with fishermen paddling one-legged along shallow waters and floating gardens.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise Of Nature
programme.desc: Join us on a journey to the heart of Costa Rica, to discover several fabulous Eden-like biotopes, and see the unprecedented efforts that are made every day to preserve, and in some cases restore, this exceptional natural heritage.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise Of Nature
programme.desc: Join us on a journey to the heart of Costa Rica, to discover several fabulous Eden-like biotopes, and see the unprecedented efforts that are made every day to preserve, and in some cases restore, this exceptional natural heritage.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren commences his second Food Trail of South Africa in the world famous Kruger National Park and surrounds.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Johannesburg - the gateway city to exploring South Africa! In this episode Warren indulges in the vibrant international flavours and surrounds of the Sandton neighbourhood, loved by locals and visitors alike.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: The wild northeast coast of South Africa is like nothing you’ve seen. And it’s here Warren will find himself romanced by empty beaches, rugged open oceans, and waterways filled with wild hippopotamus.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: In this episode, Warren experiences the abundance of wildlife here, centering his experience around tracking and finding the elusive and endangered African Wild Dog.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: A true hidden gem of South Africa, the Garden Route is a 200km stretch of coastal highway known for its beguiling diversity and unparalleled spirit of wilderness.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren has arrived into Cape Town. This won’t be your average culinary exploration of a city; Warren has dedicated the entire episode to diving into a specific style of South African cooking known as ‘Cape Malay’.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One And Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born To Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Kate Winslet: Leading Lady
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Kate Winslet, known for Titanic, is celebrated for her versatile, intense performances in both Hollywood blockbusters and indie films, cementing her as one of the finest actors of her generation.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into "Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training" at Baby Corp. Boss makes up his own imaginary friend to get out of these meetings, but after Tina gets a whiff that he may be lying, he's forced to keep up the charade at work and at home.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: It's a turf war when Bounce House Bruiser Baby encroaches on Delivery Baby's tricycle park! Tina attempts to befriend Bruiser in order to woo her back to the bounce house, but naughty behavior is the only language Bruiser understands. Determined to win this kid over, Tina ends up going rogue as a trike hoodlum, and her own field team is forced to reign her in.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of "trading up" valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter. However, a 5%er baby is in trouble and BB's field team has "got it under control"… or do they? Boss tries to juggle his Tabitha lessons with sneaking peeks at the mission in progress

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: After finding a majestic horse in the wild, Lucky and the girls set out to solve the mystery of where she came from -- and where she truly belongs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: With academy life on the horizon, the PALs work together to tame wild yearling Governor before they leave. But maybe he's not meant to be broken.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as “quicktogramming”/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a “super bug”

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: To learn about jobs, Grug assigns kids to the first “shadowing”/Ugga mistakenly creates the first gossip to impress the “nitting” club

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized – and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hippo did have hair… lots of hair! She was always harumphingly hot. Then one hot night while Hippo was sleeping a spark from the fire caught the end of her hairy tail! Hippo was on fire! She ran through the bush until SPLOSH! Hippo jumped in the waterhole. And from that day on Hippo stayed in the cool waters without a single hair on her hide. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tortoise's shell was all shiny and smooth. One day Tortoise discovered the birds were having a Feast in the Heavens and he tricked the Birds into making him a pair of wings. Greedy Tortoise raced the birds beyond the clouds and scoffed the whole feastt! When the Birds found out Tortoise had to jump off a cloud until BOOF!!! He landed on his shiny shell. All the animals pieced Tortoise's shell back together but from that day on Tortoise's shell was all bumpy and broken and he never moved speedily again. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with the cars running amok on his track and summons Bill and Nick to restore order to the track. But might our overzealous policeman overstep the mark?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Flash invites everyone to a tea party, thinking they bring the food with them. Are there going to be a lot of hungry bunnies at Silver hatch?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Farmer Green tells the cars about olden days, when the only transport was horse and cart. Maxi and Drifter say they would never be seen travelling that slow… or would they?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: FB is excited about his sleepover with the other cars in the workshop but when the night draws in he is unsure of his unfamiliar surroundings. Big Chris helps set him at his ease

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has asked CiCi to perform one of her stunts in front of a big crowd. CiCi is very nervous and Roary does his best to help his friend prepare for the event.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Set on reclaiming his throne, Uncle King Julien convinces Julien to go into Foosa territory. Julien creates a disguise and forces Maurice to join him.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Clover is forced to take a vacation, and while she's away, she meets the handsome and free-spirited Sage Moondancer.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling “Adult Babies” before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized – and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After George and Harold T.P. the entire school with toilet paper, they are forced to flush it all down the toilet causing a giant explosion that turns the French teacher into the T.P. Mummy

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When George and Harold want to win the school Avocadgrow contest, they accidentally turn their science teacher into a giant avocado monster

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: Backdraft
programme.desc: Two firefighter brothers clash while battling deadly arsons in Chicago. With explosive action and a gripping mystery, Backdraft stars Kurt Russell, William Baldwin, and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott’s epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It’s Sudden Death!

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: In Miami Vice, undercover detectives played by Jamie Foxx and Colin Farrell navigate danger, crime, and seduction in a gritty, stylish update of the iconic TV series. Also stars Gong Li.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Curse Of King Tut's Tomb Part 1
programme.desc: In 1922 Cairo, archaeologist Danny Fremont races his evil nemesis to find King Tut's Emerald Tablet, the ultimate power to control—or destroy—the world. He must brave the Valley of the Kings to solve a mystery that could change history forever.

programme.title: The Curse Of King Tut's Tomb Part 2
programme.desc: In 1922 Cairo, archaeologist Danny Fremont races his evil nemesis to find King Tut's Emerald Tablet, the ultimate power to control—or destroy—the world. He must brave the Valley of the Kings to solve a mystery that could change history forever.

programme.title: The Librarian: The Return To King Solomon's Mines
programme.desc: Adventurer Flynn Carsen receives a secret map to King Solomon's Mines. When the map is stolen, Flynn sets out to find the map and the Key of Solomon's book, without which the map is useless anyway.

programme.title: American Psycho
programme.desc: Patrick Bateman, a young man working on Wall Street at his father's company kills for no reason at all. With each day, his hatred for the world becomes more and more intense. This incredibly dark comedy is based on the book by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger stars as tough detective John Kimble in Kindergarten Cop, going undercover as a teacher to find a drug lord's wife. Packed with action, humor, and heart, it’s a classic comedy-thriller.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: In Miami Vice, undercover detectives played by Jamie Foxx and Colin Farrell navigate danger, crime, and seduction in a gritty, stylish update of the iconic TV series. Also stars Gong Li.

programme.title: American Psycho
programme.desc: Patrick Bateman, a young man working on Wall Street at his father's company kills for no reason at all. With each day, his hatred for the world becomes more and more intense. This incredibly dark comedy is based on the book by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: The World's End
programme.desc: In "The World's End", Simon Pegg and Nick Frost reunite for an epic pub crawl that turns into a fight for humanity’s future. Director Edgar Wright delivers a hilarious mix of nostalgia, comedy, and sci-fi thrills.

programme.desc: An ancient Librarian accidentally unleashes magic into the modern world! Now, he must team up with a new generation of Librarians to track down dangerous magical artifacts and fix the mess before it's too late. It's an action-packed, modern fantasy adventure!

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine, a powerful Aes Sedai, arrives in the Two Rivers and sets off on a perilous journey with five youths—one destined as the Dragon Reborn, fated to either save the world or destroy it.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean S10
programme.desc: The “Below Deck” franchise voyages to the deep blue waters of the Mediterranean Sea in “Below Deck Mediterranean.” The series follows the crewmembers aboard a private luxury yacht as they provide first-class service to wealthy guests during the charter season. In each episode, the team encounters a new group of well-to-do clients with challenging requests and lofty expectations. The young crewmembers must learn to work together as they face the inevitable drama that comes with sharing close quarters. While demanding, the job offers the crew the chance to experience the spectacular sights, sounds and tastes of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: My Day Trip
programme.desc: A special day as a gift to me! A one-day local trip project that creates a travel plan anyone can see, feel, taste, and experience the charm of the region.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of “power.” They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.title: The Seasons
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: Unkind Ladies
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Marie and Her Three Daddies
programme.desc: Marie's turbulent journey to find her father leads to the birth of an eccentric new family, one that proves stronger than blood and more persistent than DNA.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Walking On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Eunsoo was an ordinary wife and mother who never broke a rule. But when her husband is given a death sentence by illness, her daughter walks away from school, and the family home is about to be taken, life leaves her cornered. Then, a bag stuffed with drugs falls into her hands like a fate. To save her family, she makes a choice she can't turn back from.

programme.title: Dogs Are Incredible 2
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice — helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. While taking on the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that was planned for years and has to use his skills as an assassin to solve whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.desc: In honour of Rachael's dear friend, legendary singer Tony Bennett, she prepares osso buco, a dish of succulent braised veal shanks, served Florentine-style with large slices of bread.

programme.title: Magnum Muslim .357
programme.desc: A Muslim undercover cop, Lieutenant Jamal Razul a.k.a Magnum (ER Ejercito) tracks down a criminal syndicate behind the kidnapping of the Muslim Princess Ameerah (Sam Pinto). Aided by fellow officer Joselito Ibanez (Jerico Ejercito), Razul discovers that there’s more to the kidnapping than mere ransom.

programme.title: Masikip Sa Dibdib
programme.desc: Rufa Mae Quinto will prick your hearts and keep you in stitches as Boobita Rose in this quirky dramedy from director Joyce Bernal.

programme.title: Bukas na Lang Kita Mamahalin
programme.desc: Angelu de Leon and Diether Ocampo team up for the first time in this witty, heart-warming story that explores the ups and downs of romance in the 21st century.

programme.title: Dito Sa Puso Ko
programme.desc: Ligaya Tatlonghari (Judy Ann Santos) is a movie fan in every sense of the word--she eats and breathes showbiz. She has two foremost dreams: to travel to the United States, and to join her favorite TV game show.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Mapanukso
programme.desc: Carlo (Gereld Lauron) is a kind and obedient son who just happen to earn a living as a macho dancer in a gay bar. Fate intervenes when he meets Jerome (Emilio Garcia), a gay production manager, who helps him alleviate his underprivileged life.

programme.title: Kambyo
programme.desc: A heartwarming story of four men, their friendship and a road trip that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Krisanta, Iba Ka
programme.desc: The core of life starts in innocence until, outside force affect mentality that will change everything. This film will surely reawaken physical desire and lustful thoughts.

programme.title: Reyna
programme.desc: Ginnieffer Balisteros, a sad,insecure and desperate woman who feels the need to win a beauty pageant to prove her self-worth.

programme.title: Dr. X On The Air
programme.desc: Joe de Lirio (Leo Martinez) is a sexiologist, but he is better known as a radio personality. In his raunchy but highly rated radio program, "Dr. X" he gives out advice to sexually troubled women. But just as Joe is gaining a loyal following among wives, he too is earning the ire of husbands.

programme.title: On Vodka, Beers and Regrets
programme.desc: A washed up actress and former child star Jane Pineda (Bela Padilla), battles with love, chances and alcoholism as her career plummets to rock bottom.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Cry No Fear
programme.desc: Kaycee (Donnalyn Bartolome) and Wendy (Ella Cruz) are always at each other's throat. But when they are left alone in their house amidst a storm, with intruders trying to kill them, they have no choice but to become partners as they try to escape.

programme.title: BuyBust
programme.desc: After surviving the slaughter of her entire squad in a drug raid, anti-narcotics special operative Nina Manigan (Anne Curtis) is eager to go head-to-head with the drug cartels that hold a bloody grip on Manila. Trapped between a brutal drug gang and citizens, their only option is to fight their way out.

programme.title: Sanggano, Sanggago't Sanggwapo 2: Aussie! Aussie! (Osige)
programme.desc: The sequel to the misadventures of wacky trio. Their quiet simple lives as resort staff turn problematic when seductive and sexy girls check-in at their place.

programme.title: The Royal We
programme.desc: When her older sister elopes with a non-royal, Princess Bea who has lived her life away from her royal duties must now step in and honor the arranged marriage to a small kingdom prince.

programme.title: The New Adventures Of Wonder Woman E14 - Screaming Javelin
programme.desc: With the strength of Hercules, the wisdom of Athena, the speed of Mercury and the beauty of Aphrodite, she's Wonder Woman.

programme.title: Roots E06 - Part 6
programme.desc: Slave traders abduct the proud African warrior Kunta Kinte and a new American story begins. Forged in blood, sweat and tears, a dream of freedom sustains Kunta and his descendants through hardships and oppression.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 E01 - Orphan Of War
programme.desc: Xena, one of the fiercest, sexiest, most self-empowered women as she travels defending the innocent from the forces of darkness. She is the very definition of girl power.

programme.title: Frasier S4 E06 - Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: Season 4 of FRASIER finds the Crane household in a variety of turning points. Niles' long-separated wife, Maris, finally serves him with divorce papers, while Frasier finds himself trying to build a better relationship with Frederick, his son.

programme.title: Frasier S4 E07 - A Lilith Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Season 4 of FRASIER finds the Crane household in a variety of turning points. Niles' long-separated wife, Maris, finally serves him with divorce papers, while Frasier finds himself trying to build a better relationship with Frederick, his son.

programme.title: The New Adventures Of Wonder Woman E15 - Diana's Disappearing Act
programme.desc: With the strength of Hercules, the wisdom of Athena, the speed of Mercury and the beauty of Aphrodite, she's Wonder Woman.

programme.title: The Waltons S3 E12 - The Job
programme.desc: Eldest son, John-Boy Walton, makes the family proud as he starts his first year in college, pursuing his dream of becoming a writer--a course that is both challenging and rewarding for John-Boy and the entire Walton family.Younger siblings Jason and Mary Ellen Walton discover the professions to which they will devote their lives in this heartwarming drama about growing up in the loving embrace of a large Appalachia family.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: A vast majority of these strange and disturbing incidents take place in the same locations on Earth. Is it possible that extraterrestrial spacecraft are visiting Earth at so-called 'UFO Hot Spots'?

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey Jon hone in on some big-money picks in North Carolina while Danielle and Robbie meet a legendary bluegrass fiddler with an awesome Nashville collection.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: We journey deep into the rugged geography of this legendary Indonesian island and come face to face with a cannibalistic tribe - the Bataks.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: The world’s greatest fortunes often surface in the most unlikely places. From a Fabergé egg found at a humble flea market, or even a backyard sapphire worth a king’s ransom.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team battles thick kelp, brutal currents, and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Island's coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: They've been called the world's greatest archaeological enigma. 2,000-year-old geoglyphs made in the Peruvian desert that span over 50 miles. The drawings are so massive, they can be seen from the air.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: A new, subsurface investigation on Skinwalker Ranch leads to a baffling discovery near Homestead Two.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Throughout the world there are mysterious ancient stones shaped into perfect spheres. Some completely defy explanation. Could the mystery of the stone spheres provide clues about humankind's alien past?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3)
programme.desc: 'King of the Swamp' Troy Landry and Pickle Wheat get a hot tip about a place called the Snake Pit from a local. Bill and Tes investigate a rock quarry full of pythons.

programme.desc: Grab a clue on what's going on in the world of brides before you hit a salon! Enjoy a wide array of high fashion choices, undeniably romantic and decidedly feminine.

programme.title: Top Models
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Top Models
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Fashion Teens
programme.desc: Explore the latest fashion trends for teens, the cutest outfits of the A-list celebrities, mix & match insights, and style tips for all occasions.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: On his way back to the midlands, Guo Jing meets Huang Rong and they quickly fall in love. However, Ouyang Ke proposes to marry Huang Rong at the same time, so Huang’s father sets up a duel for the two men to compete for her hand. Guo Jing finally beats Ouyang Ke to win Huang Rong back.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) move into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: New Police Story
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Wing is an elite in the police force but has been drowning his guilt in booze after his entire team was killed by the “Gang of Five” in a mission. A year later, a young rookie detective with a complicated background is assigned to partner Wing and manages to inspire him into action, as Wing vows to take down the gang.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: Remember What I Forgot
programme.desc: Struggling with Alzheimer's disease, Hong Kong film buff Kim relies on his brother to manage their appliance repair shop. Kim's quirky behaviour prompts producer Ginger to suspect that he may be a film critic trying to profit from harsh reviews. Posing as a friend, Ginger uncovers Kim's secrets and sorrows as she gets closer to him and his family.

programme.title: Disciples Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Yi is a skilled disciple of the Hong Quan style kung fu who work in a textile mill recommended by his senior, Han. Han warns Yi not to show off his martial arts skill so as to avoid getting into trouble. However, Yi does not listen and eventually gets dangerously involved in the conflict between two opposing textile mills.

programme.title: The Deadly Breaking Sword
programme.desc: Warrior Tuan Chang Qing meets courtesan Liu Yin Xi in a small town. Liu pleads Tuan to kill the underworld master Guo Tian Sheng, known as the "Killer Doctor", in order to avenge the death of her fiance. Tuan and gambling addict Xiao Dao breaks into Guo's household, triggering the battle of good against evil.

programme.title: The Lychee Road
programme.desc: A single lychee triggers a Tang Dynasty “Mission Impossible”! Junior official Li races 1,000 miles in three days to satisfy a consort’s craving – an epic ride of tension, humour and biting satire!

programme.title: Man Of Iron
programme.desc: A fearless fighter, Chou Lian Huan has risen to power in Shanghai with his exceptional combat skills. He risks his life for hostess Shen Ju Fang and embarks on a series of fierce battles against the son of a notorious triad leader and his gang, ultimately becoming a scapegoat in the gang's deadly turf war.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing and his brother arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Befriending a powerful mobster Tam, Ma is given his nightclub when he saves Tam’s life. Ma’s fortune rises but he must overcome the corruption and violence to survive.

programme.title: As The Light Goes Out
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve in Hong Kong, a team of firefighters battle an out-of-control warehouse fire that threatens to plunge the entire city into darkness. The team must put their differences aside and come together for an ultimate battle to stop the fire spreading to a nearby power plant.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: The Weird Man
programme.desc: During the Three Kingdoms period, a Taoist priest Yu Ji cures many patients with his supernatural powers and is loved by the people. However, the arrogant general Sun Che thinks that Yu Ji bewitches people and orders for him to be beheaded. Subsequently, the spirit of the Yu Ji rises from his dead body and takes revenge on Sun Che.

programme.title: I Corrupt All Cops
programme.desc: Corruption was rampant in the Hong Kong Police Force in 1960s and 70s. Chief Inspector Lak launders drug money with three other police officers, and a young officer from the newly established Independent Commission Against Corruption division is determined to bring them down.

programme.title: What Price Honesty
programme.desc: In this period martial arts thriller, three police graduates are assigned to a town rife with crimes and corruption. They vow to uphold justice but are hampered by their corrupt superior, resulting in them putting their lives and the lives of their beloved in danger.

programme.title: Oscar Ramos, Hitman
programme.desc: Oscar Ramos (Ramon Revilla) is a respected man in the community. He settles disputes and takes up the cudgels for the oppressed. He also has a secret -- an amulet that protects him from bullets. Will his amulet protect him when both the police and Ka Ernie's group hunt him down?

programme.title: Pinagbiyak Na Bunga (Lookalayk)
programme.desc: Watching Andrew E and Chiquito together as they play the parts of con-men who might indeed be father and son.

programme.title: Akin Ang Pangarap Mo
programme.desc: Leo is engaged to Anita out of convenience since her father and her parents are long time friends. It was never an issue, until Leo meets Gigi during his stay in the family farm.

programme.title: Kailangan Ko'y Ikaw
programme.desc: Francine Natra (Regine Velasquez) and Gimo Talumpati (Robin Padilla) crossed paths when Gimo won the "Date With A Star" contest thus taking the popular Francine on a special date. But their fairytale love story struggled when the relationship went public.

programme.title: Magic Kombat
programme.desc: Enter the world of mischief adventures and hilarious experiences in the video game land.

programme.title: Rosalie 19: Reyna Ng Bocaue
programme.desc: For many years, Monette has raised her daughter on her earnings as a bold dancer. But now that she is old, she finds herself ousted as the club's main attraction. Instead, she finds out her daughter Rosalie (Ilonah Jean) is taking her place as queen of the girls joints. But, one by one, Rosalie's enemies are found dead including the corrupt club owner and Monette's lustful boyfriend.

programme.title: Dos Bravos
programme.desc: Pancho (Niño Muhlach) is travelling from one town to the next in the hope of finding his long lost father. His only clue is a handkerchief embroidered with an emblem of Hacienda BM. Later, Pancho ask the help of Valdes (Dante Varona).

programme.title: Bakit May Pag-Ibig Pa?
programme.desc: The movie is divided into two episodes; the first half tells the story of a spirited ex nun and a dispirited architect. The second half tells another chance between two former lovers.

programme.title: Sa Hirap At Ginhawa (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: In the story, a young couple eloped, got married and then must cope with problems like money, living on their own, trying to finish school and raising a baby.

programme.title: Papunta Ka Pa Lang, Pabalik Na Ako
programme.desc: Gaston, a veteran police officer does not want Jojo, a rookie police asset, for his daughter. Jojo proves himself and he finds a sidekick in Jojo.

programme.title: Magnong Rehas
programme.desc: Action star Raymart Santiago tackles the title role MAGNONG REHAS. Magno is a watch-your-car boy in love with a sales girl Abigail (Gelli de Belen). But Abigail's policeman uncle, Dado (Roi Vinzon) hates Magno's guts.

programme.title: Andrew Ford Medina ('Wag Kang Gamol!)
programme.desc: Andrewford Medina (Andrew E) and Jinglebert (Dennis Padilla) do odd jobs for a hotel. Andrew joins a rap competition where Gilbert challenges aspiring rappers and shows his idol who the real king of rap is.

programme.title: Alyas Pogi 2
programme.desc: All patrolman Henry Cruz "Alyas Pogi" wants is to live a simple life with his son. But his former enemies would not allow it.

programme.title: Body Of Lies
programme.desc: Trust no one. Deceive everyone. When idealistic CIA agent Roger Ferris (Di Caprio -- The Departed, Blood Diamond) is stationed in Jordan after being wounded in Iraq, he dedicates his life to stopping further attacks by Al Qaeda. Following a plan that the British employed successfully against the Nazis, Ferris plants the suspicion among the terrorists that their leaders are collaborating with the Americans. But as the stakes rise and Ferris finds himself in the crosshairs, the plot he starts spirals into an outcome he could never have foreseen.

programme.title: Magnum Force
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Clint Eastwood stars as San Francisco Police Inspector Harry Callahan better known as "Dirty Harry" because of the tough way he pursues criminals in this bare-knuckled action film. Investigating the assassinations of crime bosses, Dirty Harry discovers the killers are police who, frustrated by the judicial system, have vowed to rid the city of crime by any means--even killing fellow police officers.

programme.desc: In the season two premiere, Michael poses as a hipster at a farmers market and makes an endless supply of juice. Then things become blurry at the eye doctor, and later, shape shifting aliens send Michael's co-worker into a frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 02
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The West Wing S1 7
programme.desc: The President and First Lady host a tense dinner.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 2
programme.desc: Contestants compete for a shot at $25,000 as they brave the world's most unforgiving battleground.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 3
programme.desc: Four containers, straight from the Big Apple, make their way to Long Beach, CA. A can full of broken dummies generates some serious buzz, while a billionaire's unclaimed goods have everyone seeing dollar signs. Plus, a one-of-a-kind auction that includes the container itself.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S6 20
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item for them, then help teach tech to senior citizens. Plus, after a successful secret pact, the big loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his own father.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S6 21
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when Sal, Murr, Q and Joe square off in a toy-pitching competition. And the big loser nearly gets the shush beat out of him while trying to quiet down patrons in the food court.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 3
programme.desc: With $25,000 on the line, only the strong survive The Thunderdome.

programme.title: Smallville S1 18

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 03

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 04
programme.desc: Working at a tattoo parlor, Michael gets some killer ink in a flash. Then it's SNAKES ON A SEDAN when a serpent ambushes a routine car checkup, and down on the docks, one unlucky guy learns a lesson in shrinkage.

programme.desc: JJ learns to take care of himself! He learns to brush his teeth, gets ready for school & visits the dentist!

programme.desc: Orphle & Winston have the worst ideas ever! They multiply Orphle & turn Winston into a rat by mistake!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Bedtime Stories & Fun!
programme.desc: It's bedtime fun! JJ has a slumber party, helps find 5 little ducks & sings "Happy and You Know It"!

programme.title: Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: It's Gecko vs. Weasel! They have a car wash competition & Weasel tries to steal the plans for the Mechanicals!

programme.title: A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork! The Mechanicals finish a job when Gecko is injured & Gecko helps Mr. Weasel!

programme.title: Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle turn little problems into big adventures! They rescue a dog & help Daddy after a hairy mishap!

programme.title: A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle welcome new Magic Pets! They meet a pet that grows jungles & one that makes juice pops!

programme.title: Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: It's Jill's super creative adventure! She decorates a dress & makes her shoes sparkle with stickers!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Making Memories!
programme.desc: The siblings make memories! They look at old photos, bake with Grandma & learn to wash their hands!

programme.title: Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's inventions are going haywire! The smart house has a tantrum & a time machine creates a pterodactyl!

programme.title: Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: Arpo has crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! He races Nannybot in a go-kart & dances uncontrollably!

programme.title: When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Magical Pet powers run wild! A Bubble Monster traps everyone & a sick Shrubcub makes vines grow!

programme.title: Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's Orphle's big day of trouble! He makes colorful clones of himself & attacks his friends' cardboard castle!

programme.title: Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Baby John is growing up! He learns that being little is awesome, shows his feelings & finds his lost pacifier!

programme.title: Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: It's Jill's super creative adventure! She decorates a dress & makes her shoes sparkle with stickers!

programme.title: Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: It's a bubbly day of fun! Bubbles invents a bouncy blob that goes out of control & spoils Pogo's magic show!

programme.title: Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: The Minibods are hungry! Pogo waits for a fruit to ripen & Lulu's cupcake mix turns into a giant blob!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing with JJ & his animal friends! They perform "Old Macdonald" & a play version of "Hey Diddle Diddle"!

Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Business + Truth or Fake
programme.desc: The presenters offer you the latest news, developments and updates from the world of business and economy.

programme.title: Australian Story - Striking A Chord - Astrid Jorgensen
programme.desc: When Astrid Jorgensen started Pub Choir in a small Brisbane bar, she never imagined she would be filling halls across the world eight years later.

programme.title: Back Roads - Lucindale, SA
programme.desc: Kristy O'Brien ventures to the tiny South Australian town of Lucindale, discovering a small community playing a big role in keeping the most colourful bush traditions alive.

programme.title: The World - Episode 34
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Episode 8
programme.desc: It's a mecca for surfies, hippies and influencers, and Julia Zemiro is in Byron Bay to discover why this sun-kissed spot is such a magnet.

programme.title: Bee Cause - On the Move
programme.desc: As almond orchard plantings have increased in Australia, so has the need for bees which are vital for pollination. Co-ordinating the annual mass migration of millions of bees to trees, is a bee broker, and it's a tough job.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals - Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentricity abounds in one of the planet's most isolated and unique ecosystems. This episode examines some of the most eccentric Australian animals showing that being a bit odd works out for these creatures.

programme.title: Culture By Design - Everyday Design
programme.desc: Thoughtful design enhances daily lives in ways we don't always notice. Learn about the creatives who practice forward-thinking designs in Mumbai (furniture design), Yogyakarta (ceramics), and Central Java (bamboo bikes).

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 44
programme.desc: More news, more often. Wherever you are stay in touch with ABC News. We've got more reporters in more places, connecting communities and covering the stories and issues that matter to you. Presented by Michael Tetlow.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 18
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 34
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 34
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Episode 8
programme.desc: It's a mecca for surfies, hippies and influencers, and Julia Zemiro is in Byron Bay to discover why this sun-kissed spot is such a magnet.

programme.title: Bee Cause - On the Move
programme.desc: As almond orchard plantings have increased in Australia, so has the need for bees which are vital for pollination. Co-ordinating the annual mass migration of millions of bees to trees, is a bee broker, and it's a tough job.

programme.title: Australian Story - Striking A Chord - Astrid Jorgensen
programme.desc: When Astrid Jorgensen started Pub Choir in a small Brisbane bar, she never imagined she would be filling halls across the world eight years later.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Summer: Dreamy Kitchen Garden & Snake Safety
programme.desc: Costa gets expert snake safety advice, Sophie finds a subtropical oasis, Clarence revamps a rain-soaked patch, Josh visits a wetland restoration project, and we meet a horticulturalist running a beautiful restaurant garden.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw - Legendary Veggies
programme.desc: Two legends cooking with legendary veggies? Yes please! Presenter, podcaster and author Linda Marigliano and champion community leader Amar Singh join Adam in the kitchen.

programme.title: The World - Episode 34
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 45
programme.desc: As the day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, interviews and the day's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 45
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. Bridget Brennan and James Glenday present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Emma Rebellato, Catherine Murphy and Nate Byrne.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 45
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 45
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 2
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Epstein Files
programme.desc: It's the scandal that shocked Americans and rocked the Trump administration. A legal and political saga that has shattered fundamental beliefs that all are equal in the eyes of the law. What do the Epstein Files reveal?

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 5
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia - Yarraville Pigeon
programme.desc: In Yarraville, Victoria, a passive house builder starts a crusade to build the healthiest home in Australia on the site of an old pigeon club house! (Final)

programme.title: Iconic Australia - The Rebels
programme.desc: When you look back through Australia's history, social progress is almost always marked by the rebellious behaviour of larrikin Aussies who, through their charisma, authenticity and passionate determination created change.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 45
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw - Good Vibes
programme.desc: It's Easy Entertaining, and Hotluck Snack Club's Gaspar Tse and host Brihony Dawson join Adam to share their tricks for bringing good vibes to any gathering.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 63
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 35
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia - Yarraville Pigeon
programme.desc: In Yarraville, Victoria, a passive house builder starts a crusade to build the healthiest home in Australia on the site of an old pigeon club house! (Final)

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: The laughs don't stop when a male doctor (Arnold Schwarzenegger) becomes pregnant after his associate (Danny DeVito) talks him into taking an experimental drug as part of a research project.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen jumps on his motorcycle and leads the way in this thrill-packed adventure that blends top stars, a true-life WWII saga and Hollywood's gift for storytelling into a bravura, blockbuster film.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Oz
programme.desc: Young Dorothy and her dog are swept away by a tornado to the magical Land of Oz, and embark on a quest with 3 new friends to see the Wizard, who can return her to her home and fulfill the others' wishes.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: This ensemble romantic comedy revolves around five relationships in Los Angeles—all of which intersect and are put through the paces during the titular romantic holiday.
